description: Add a test similar to TestReadyClosedBlockerHidden (cli_test.go:1027) but for list output: create two issues, link A blocks B, close A, run bw list — B should not show [blocked by: A].

comments.text: Test already landed as TestListClosedBlockerHidden in the bw-vf1.2 commit.

title: Add test for closed blocker filtering in bw list
